forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.lead: Enter the email address associated with your account and we'll send instructions to reset your password.
forgotPassword.success: If an account exists for {email}, we've sent password reset instructions to that address.
forgotPassword.sentDetails: Check your inbox for an email from {from} with instructions. If you don't see it, check your spam folder.
forgotPassword.notFound: No account found for that email address.
forgotPassword.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please wait {minutes, plural, one {# minute} other {# minutes}} and try again.

resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.lead: Create a strong password you haven't used elsewhere.
resetPassword.success: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in with your new password.
resetPassword.invalidToken: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
resetPassword.passwordRequirements: Password must be at least {minLength} characters and include a mix of letters, numbers and symbols.

login.title: Sign in
login.lead: Sign in to access your classes, messages and documents.
login.locked: Your account is temporarily locked. Try again later.
login.twoFactorPrompt: Enter the authentication code from your authenticator app.

register.title: Create an account
register.lead: Create an account to join classes, share documents and start tutoring.
register.success: Welcome aboard! Check your email to verify your account.
register.emailInUse: This email is already in use.

validation.email: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.passwordComplexity: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter and one number.
validation.invalidCode: The code you entered is invalid.

errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
errors.validationFailed: Validation failed. Check the highlighted fields and try again.
errors.serviceUnavailable: Service temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.

notifications.emailSent: {count, plural, one {An email has been sent} other {# emails have been sent}}.
notifications.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

forgotPassword.subject: Reset your Plateforme Scolaire password
forgotPassword.intro: We received a request to reset the password for your account ({email}).
forgotPassword.outro: If you didn't request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email.
forgotPassword.expiryNotice: This link will expire in {hours, plural, one {# hour} other {# hours}}.

welcome.subject: Welcome to Plateforme Scolaire
welcome.intro: Thanks for creating an account. Verify your email to get started.

relative.minutesAgo: {count, plural, one {# minute ago} other {# minutes ago}}
relative.hoursAgo: {count, plural, one {# hour ago} other {# hours ago}}
relative.daysAgo: {count, plural, one {# day ago} other {# days ago}}

examples.plural: You have {count, plural, =0 {no new messages} one {# new message} other {# new messages}}.
